user.title: Add Fan
user.description: Configure M.A.I Climate for your fan. Each fan is an independent device you can manage separately.

data_description.fan_name: Display name, e.g. Work desk fan
data_description.humidity_sensor: Used for accurate heat index calculation. Defaults to 70% if not set.
data_description.presence_sensor: Only auto-turn on when someone is present.
data_description.ac_entity: Link an AC to this fan for smart climate synergy features.
data_description.auto_on_threshold: Fan turns on automatically when heat index exceeds this value. Default: 38°C
data_description.auto_on_enabled: Quick toggle to enable or disable the auto-on behavior.

error.entity_not_found: Fan entity not found in your system

abort.already_configured: This fan is already managed by M.A.I Climate
